creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #3)
Backlight command works on console, too.
Although acpi_video.ko is already loaded, hotkeys(Fn-F5/F6) are not working with drm-515-kmod on my sony vaio notebook pc.
I can lower the brightness using the backlight command you taught me, so I don't have any major problems, thank you.
